title: Harden installation and documentation boundaries
outOfScope: Publishing a new Git tag or GitHub release asset
Providing cryptographic signatures or provenance attestations

sources.reason: User-reported malformed marker data-loss and installed document structure defects.
User-reported mutable default ref and missing archive integrity verification.
User-reported mutable quick install and overstated guard semantics.

riskAssessment.reason: Installer changes affect user-authored rules and remote code acquisition; documentation defines the trust boundary.

executionDecision.reason: The reported defects are reproducible and can be verified without publishing external artifacts.

preReviewWarnings: Review malformed marker rejection for all marker count/order cases.
Review remote archive verification portability and failure behavior.
Review support and guard wording for permission-model accuracy.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Upgrade and force fail before writing when agent markers are missing, duplicated, or out of order.
Installed agent managed sections contain no YAML front matter or level-one heading.
Remote installation defaults to a fixed release tag and verifies SHA256 when supplied, failing closed on mismatch or missing hash tooling.
Pinned-version installation is the primary documented path and mutable main execution is not recommended.
Scope and coverage guard documentation says checks detect violations and block finish, archive, or merge rather than preventing writes.
Every language example installation command includes --update-makefile.
Framework support claims explicitly require build-tool and guard customization.
Reported Japanese terminology and example section numbering defects are corrected in scoped documents.
All required AI and project checks pass.
guidelines: Never guess how to repair malformed managed markers in user-authored files.
Remote integrity checks must fail closed when explicitly requested.
Installed managed content must be structurally valid inside an existing Markdown document.
Security and guard documentation must describe enforcement timing precisely.
Do not hand-edit generated cockpit status.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
